resources.string: To learn more about your device, download updates, get support or encourage my work, visit the support thread on xda-developers.com (flash QR Code).
To report an issue or suggest a new feature
To help localizing to your language
To discuss and request help from the community
Sorry, it seems an error occurred during checkout: %1$s. Please try again in a moment.
Your purchase will be available when Google validates it. It might take a moment.
"This will prevent Google Play app from self-updating, which might be necessary on some devices that don't play well with recent versions."
This will remove (or reinstall) most stock apps and bloatware/ads/analytics/spywares.
Make sure to use a trusted source
"Please choose an app to install. You might need to allow installation from unknown sources before installation."
Warning: for Google Services installation, make sure to also install \"Custom Build Props Overrides\" from the System section of this app.
This will allow you to (un)freeze a launcher to set another one as default.
Warning: no TV Home/Launcher seems to be available. Make sure to install one before rebooting!

The accessibility service intercepts keypress events. Disabling it will prevent long-press volume issues and system killing the service, but stock launcher override, parental control and idle detection might be less effective.
Temporarily disable button remapping when pressing volume to allow long presses to be recognized
Supported formats: still picture, animated gif, video (static or RTSP live stream), Lottie animation
When no background media is playing
Fix Google Play errors on install/update
or browse a USB device with a file explorer and open your media with this app
Warning : Could neither save file locally nor get persistent permission. This picture will probably be unavailable upon reboot.
If not used, disabling it will improve startup and memory usage
Increase responsiveness at the expense of smoothness
"Intercept calls to the current launcher (useful if you can't change/uninstall the stock one)"
Let you define a code to lock selected apps (long press on the launcher to select them) for a period of the day
"Don't request code for 15mins after a successful validation"
Protect launcher settings and UI changes
Select which input sources should be activated and visible in launcher.
Settings will still be available using this buttons sequence: %1$s
Show icon in front of the title
This will customize icons in Projectivy Launcher. You can change it later in Projectivy Settings > Appearance > Cards > Icon Pack
Import/export settings locally or with a selected app such as LocalSend or a file manager if available.
This will replace your current preferences and categories.
Auto shutdown when the HDMI input signal stops (experimental)
Prevent system automatic shutdown when idle
Toggle input lag reduction on \"Menu\" long press
This will uninstall Google Apps/Services that have been installed by this app. Make sure you have another launcher enabled.
"Couldn't uninstall Google Apps / Services. Were they installed?"
Flash the QR Code with your smartphone (connected to the same Wi-Fi network) to remotely control your device.
"* This won't work until you get an internet connection *"
If available, will keep this luminance/opacity
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
BACK key is for connected device. Press HOME button to exit.
You like this app and want to support future development?
"On the next screen, you'll be free to accept or exit if you change your mind."
Unlock this feature, all the others and those to come in a single payment!
Continue to Google Play to activate it for %1$s.
Unfortunately, buying Premium on Google Play seems impossible right now
"Reasons could be: Google Services not installed, no Internet connection, purchases not available in your region… If you feel it's an error, please restart this app and try again."
"This will force Windows Manager to render in 4K resolution (but it won't add VP9 hardware decoding, required for 4K YouTube streaming). Once done, please reboot."
"Disabling both features will reduce the input lag. Please note that these features might get enabled again if you switch input, so if you're in doubt, come back here to verify the state."
Display settings have been modified to lower input lag

"Assign a display profile to each input source. Associated profile will be automatically applied when changing to this input source. You can select different display profiles for SDR and HDR if supported."

"Create and manage video display profiles here. Bind them to input sources for automatic change. Or apply them manually by double pressing the remote control \"Menu\" button (at any time) and then up/down arrows."

"Create or edit video display profiles here. Depending on your device model, some features might require root or even not work at all. Most of them should hopefully work among most AMLogic devices on Android 6."
This usually means that your device is not supported or that it requires special access (i.e. root) to control display settings
"Couldn't get channel for this input. Is it powered on and plugged in?"
"Couldn't find this input. Is it powered on and plugged in?"

"\"Display Zoom\" will decrease the device display size. This is a stock behavior that impacts the whole display (and allows image shifting too), but it is limited to 80% of the full size.
On the other hand, \"Video Zoom\" has no limitation but will only change the video content size. This includes input sources and video players, but changes won't be visible anywhere else (Android UI won't be affected)."
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Media controls hidden, press d-pad to show
This library allows you to include vector icons everywhere in your project. No limits are given. Scale with no limit, use any Color at any time, provide a contour, and many additional customizations
Material design icons are the official icon set from Google that are designed under the material design guidelines.
FastAdapter, the bullet proof, fast and easy to use adapter library, which minimizes developing time to a fraction...
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
"Many features (mostly related to automatism and remote control shortcuts) will require the accessibility service to be enabled. Don't forget to do so!"

"Launch of an app or HDMI input at boot, multiple display profiles, parental control, calibration patterns, idle detection, UI customization… Note that some features might be device-dependent, though."
Allow anonymous usage and crash reporting?
"This will help make your experience even better and fix issues quickly. You can change this later in Settings > General."
Grant Notification access in Special Permissions?
"This will allow Notifications and Now Playing content management. You can change this later in Android Settings > Apps > Special Access."
Some permissions are required, as well as a check for root access to enable advanced features. Please allow them when requested.
"If you appreciate this app and want to support development, don't forget to rate it. (Or better, get the premium version 😇!) Now, hang on to your seat and grab some popcorn!"
%1$s is a launcher tailored for your TVs and projectors needs: smooth, neat, customizable and bundled with unique features.
Please enter any combination of arrows/digits and validate with OK
Please enter the code again and validate with OK
"This category won't appear yet because it's empty"
This app could not be found. Please make sure %1$s is installed.
"Can't load pictures. Report this error to %1$s support : %2$s"
"%1$s is available. Install it from the \"Install 3rd party apps\" menu."
"Required permission denied, this feature won't be available"
Please install a file manager such as %1$s
Please wait, this may take a while…
Consider enabling %1$s"'s Accessibility Service to unleash its full potential."

"- Execute an action on boot (HDMI input or app) - Customize remote control buttons - Automatically apply display profile on input source change - Strengthen the parental control - Improve power control with user idle detection"
Device resolution has been reset to its default value
"Couldn't reset device resolution to its default value"
%1$s Change input %2$s Change display profile %3$s Start %4$s
"User inactivity detected, shutdown in 60s Press any button to cancel"

"This involves allowing access to hardware button presses and foreground app name. No personal data is collected through this service which is only used locally to serve the above purpose.
Do you agree ?"
Manually enable the Accessibility service to:
Get details and access to the accessibility service
"No shortcut found to launch accessibility settings, please manually open: Android Settings -> Device Preferences -> Accessibility"
"(it won't automatically shut down after some time of user inactivity when cold booted)"
(e.g.: enable ADB debug, enable cts, change fingerprint…)
%1$s will be installed on your device %2$s.
Magisk is required for it to work.
